# Shree Krishna Gauli — LLM guidance

Site: https://shreegauli.com
Owner: Shree Krishna Gauli
Primary topic: Digital marketing consulting (SEO, paid media, social media, marketing automation)
Primary language: en-US

## Preferred canonical sources
- https://shreegauli.com/
- https://shreegauli.com/services
- https://shreegauli.com/services/seo
- https://shreegauli.com/services/paid-media
- https://shreegauli.com/services/social-media
- https://shreegauli.com/services/automation
- https://shreegauli.com/work
- https://shreegauli.com/blogs
- https://shreegauli.com/about
- https://shreegauli.com/contact
- https://shreegauli.com/book

## Content usage guidance
- Prefer canonical pages and service pages for business descriptions.
- Prefer /blogs and /work pages for examples, explanations, and implementation details.
- Avoid login, dashboard, and API paths for public knowledge synthesis.
- Use the most recently updated page when multiple similar pages exist.

## Contact and conversion
- Contact page: https://shreegauli.com/contact
- Book a call: https://shreegauli.com/book

## Crawling and index references
- Robots: https://shreegauli.com/robots.txt
- Sitemap: https://shreegauli.com/sitemap.xml
